response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the video's content as a talking segment by Anya Melfissa, followed by a 3D performance of her original song, 'CHRONIC'. 2. Extracted the song title 'CHRONIC' and the performer 'Anya Melfissa' from on-screen graphics. 3. Confirmed 'CHRONIC' is an original song by Anya Melfissa, not a cover. 4. Searched for 'Anya Melfissa CHRONIC lyrics' to obtain full English lyrics. Since the song is originally in English, the original and translated lyrics are the same. 5. Mapped the scenes based on the transition at 02:35.
response.global_summary: A video of Anya Melfissa introducing and performing her original song, 'CHRONIC'. The first part consists of Anya talking about a Hololive card game and the song announcement, followed by a full 3D performance of 'CHRONIC'.

scenes.description: Anya Melfissa talks about a Hololive card game and makes announcements.
Anya Melfissa performs her original song 'CHRONIC'.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah
Hey
Yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah

[Verse 1]
Walking round' in reality, I'm so done, done
Feel like I'm losing my gravity, my vision
Of you that I see clearly in my mind
I'm so you
My thoughts collide in my mind, I know I really should try
To think, to think on my own, but oh

[Pre-Chorus]
We're tied together, it's true
I think I'm becoming you
Don't blink, don't blink, I, I, they're asking who

[Chorus]
Took me so far away, far away
Digitally recreate everything
I, I
I wanna show you why I
(Parallel we rise)
Love it, chk-chk-boom
Chronic, chronic, chronic, collide 'til we go atomic
Turn it, turn it, turn it to a different space, different wave
Want it, want it, want it, opposites go supersonic
Love it, love it, love it, dive into the fate we made

[Verse 2]
Sometimes I think you're here, yeah, you're my only one
You make it feel so real, outside it's so bizarre
Devastation and creation, ooh
I'll be your shooting star

[Pre-Chorus]
A new perspective of life while I just try to survive
I know, I know, we're not going down
I guess I can't compromise the in-between of our lives
I know, I know, I, I, you must be who

[Chorus]
Took me so far away, far away
Digitally recreate everything
I, I
I wanna show you why I
(Parallel we rise)
Love it, chk-chk-boom
Chronic, chronic, chronic, collide 'til we go atomic
Turn it, turn it, turn it to a different space, different wave
Want it, want it, want it, opposites go supersonic
Love it, love it, love it, dive into the fate we made

[Bridge]
(Ooh)

[Chorus]
Chronic, chronic, chronic, collide 'til we go atomic
Turn it, turn it, turn it to a different space, different wave
Want it, want it, want it, opposites go supersonic
Love it, love it, love it, dive into the fate we made

[Outro]
Whisper
Come take me right away
Whisper
